title: Plant Pot Saucers 30cm 35cm 40cm 45cm, plant trays for pots, drip tray, flower pot saucers, heavy duty plant pot trays, watering trays for plants (30CM, 1, Package Quantity)
features: These heavy-duty plant saucers provide sturdy support for pots, catching excess water to prevent spills and stains. Ideal for indoor and outdoor use, they help maintain healthy plants, clean surfaces.
The durable plant tray design ensures excellent water retention, protecting your floors and surfaces from moisture damage. Perfect for use with various pot sizes, offering long-lasting performance.
Designed for durability, these drip trays for plant pots effectively prevent water runoff, protecting your surfaces from damage while promoting healthy plant growth by maintaining moisture levels.
Our sturdy plant trays are designed to fit pots of various sizes, offering protection from water overflow while enhancing plant care, making them ideal for all types of plants and spaces.
These plant saucers feature a sleek, low-profile design that complements any décor, while their UV-resistant material ensures long-lasting performance, even under direct sunlight in outdoor settings.
description: Product Description Previous page THICK & DURABLE Made from robust plastic, ensuring longevity & resistance to cracking, even when exposed to sunlight DEEPER DESIGN A deeper design holds more water, ensuring better moisture retention and less overflow. UV-RESISTANT Black plant pot saucers prevent fading and cracking, ideal for prolonged outdoor use. Next page 1 THICK & DURABLE 2 DEEPER DESIGN 3 UV-RESISTANT 4 VARIOUS SIZES What materials are the round pot saucers made of? Our round pot saucers are made from durable, high-quality plastic, designed to be lightweight yet strong enough to support various pot sizes. The material is resistant to wear, ensuring long-lasting use, even in outdoor conditions. Are these saucers suitable for both indoor and outdoor use? Yes, the round pot saucers are designed to be versatile and can be used both indoors and outdoors. Their durable construction helps prevent water damage to surfaces inside and withstands weather conditions outside. Can these saucers handle heavy pots? Yes, our round pot saucers are built to support heavy pots. They have a sturdy, reinforced design to handle the weight of large, water-filled pots without cracking or warping.
